001/************************* PROJECT RON *************************/
002/* Copyright (c) 2026 StuyPulse Robotics. All rights reserved. */
003/* Use of this source code is governed by an MIT-style license */
004/* that can be found in the repository LICENSE file.           */
005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake;
007
008import java.util.Optional;
009import java.util.function.BooleanSupplier;
010
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.ControlRequest;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.DutyCycleOut;
013import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.Follower;
014import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.PositionTorqueCurrentFOC;
015import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.TorqueCurrentFOC;
016import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.VoltageOut;
017import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
018import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.MotorAlignmentValue;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Motors;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
022import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.EnabledSubsystems;
023import com.stuypulse.robot.util.LoggedSignals;
024import com.stuypulse.robot.util.SysId;
025import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.BStream;
026import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.filters.BDebounce;
027
028import dev.doglog.DogLog;
029import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Amps;
030import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Seconds;
031import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Volts;
032import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Angle;
033import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.AngularVelocity;
034import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
035import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.DigitalInput;
036import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine;
037
038public class IntakeImpl extends Intake {
039
040    private final DigitalInput pivotLimitSwitch;
041    
042    private final TalonFX pivotMotor;
043
044    private final TalonFX rollerMotorLeft;
045
046    private final TalonFX rollerMotorRight;
047
048    private final PositionTorqueCurrentFOC positionController;
049
050    private final VoltageOut homingController;
051
052    private final TorqueCurrentFOC pushdownController;
053
054    private final DutyCycleOut rollerController;
055
056    private final Follower followerController;
057
058    private final LoggedSignals pivotSignals;
059
060    private final LoggedSignals rollerSignals;
061
062    private final BooleanSupplier pivotStalling;
063
064    private Optional<Voltage> pivotVoltageOverride;
065
066    private final BStream leftRollerStalling;
067
068    private final BStream rightRollerStalling;
069
070    public IntakeImpl() {
071
072        pivotLimitSwitch = new DigitalInput(Ports.Intake.PIVOT_LIMIT_SWITCH);
073        pivotMotor = new TalonFX(Ports.Intake.INTAKE_PIVOT_MOTOR, Settings.CANBUS);
074        Motors.Intake.PIVOT_CONFIG.configure(pivotMotor);
075        // zero it at the up pos
076        pivotMotor.setPosition(Settings.Intake.Pivot.INITIAL_ANGLE);
077        pivotSignals = new LoggedSignals(LoggedSignals.SignalLocation.CANIVORE, "Intake/Pivot/",
078                pivotMotor.getSupplyCurrent(),
079                pivotMotor.getStatorCurrent(),
080                pivotMotor.getVelocity());
081        // until rollers are fixed
082        // leader
083        rollerMotorLeft = new TalonFX(Ports.Intake.INTAKE_ROLLER_MOTOR_LEFT, Settings.CANBUS);
084        rollerMotorRight = new TalonFX(Ports.Intake.INTAKE_ROLLER_MOTOR_RIGHT, Settings.CANBUS);
085        Motors.Intake.LEFT_ROLLER_CONFIG.configure(rollerMotorLeft);
086        Motors.Intake.RIGHT_ROLLER_CONFIG.configure(rollerMotorRight);
087        // until rollers are fixed
088        rollerSignals = new LoggedSignals(LoggedSignals.SignalLocation.CANIVORE, "Intake/Roller/").withMotor(
089                "Intake Roller Left",
090                rollerMotorLeft.getSupplyCurrent(),
091                rollerMotorLeft.getStatorCurrent(),
092                rollerMotorLeft.getVelocity())
093                .withMotor(
094                        "Intake Roller Right",
095                        rollerMotorRight.getSupplyCurrent(),
096                        rollerMotorRight.getStatorCurrent(),
097                        rollerMotorRight.getVelocity());
098        positionController = new PositionTorqueCurrentFOC(getState().getTargetAngle());
099        homingController = new VoltageOut(Settings.Intake.Pivot.HOMING_DOWN_VOLTAGE).withEnableFOC(true);
100        pushdownController = new TorqueCurrentFOC(Settings.Intake.Pivot.PUSHDOWN_CURRENT.getAsDouble());
101        rollerController = new DutyCycleOut(getState().getTargetDutyCycle()).withEnableFOC(true);
102        followerController = new Follower(Ports.Intake.INTAKE_ROLLER_MOTOR_LEFT, MotorAlignmentValue.Opposed);
103        rollerMotorRight.setControl(followerController);
104        pivotStalling = () -> pivotMotor.getStatorCurrent().getValue().gt(Settings.Intake.Pivot.STALL_CURRENT);
105        // until rollers are fixed
106        leftRollerStalling = BStream.create(
107                () -> rollerMotorLeft.getStatorCurrent().getValueAsDouble() > Settings.Intake.Roller.STALL_CURRENT
108                        .in(Amps))
109                .filtered(new BDebounce.Both(Settings.Intake.Roller.STALL_DEBOUNCE_SEC.in(Seconds)));
110        rightRollerStalling = BStream.create(
111                () -> rollerMotorRight.getStatorCurrent()
112                        .getValueAsDouble() > Settings.Intake.Roller.STALL_CURRENT.in(Amps))
113                .filtered(new BDebounce.Both(Settings.Intake.Roller.STALL_DEBOUNCE_SEC.in(Seconds)));
114        pivotVoltageOverride = Optional.empty();
115    }
116
117    // For sysid
118    @Override
119    public void setPivotVoltageOverride(Voltage voltage) {
120        this.pivotVoltageOverride = Optional.of(voltage);
121    }
122
123    /** ****************** */
124    /** Pivot Commands ** */
125    /** ****************** */
126    
127    @Override
128    public boolean limitSwitchHit() {
129        return !pivotLimitSwitch.get();
130    }
131    
132    @Override
133    public Angle getRelativePosition() {
134        return pivotMotor.getPosition().getValue();
135    }
136
137    @Override
138    public void seedPivotAngle(Angle angle) {
139        pivotMotor.setPosition(angle);
140    }
141
142    private boolean pivotStalling() {
143        return pivotStalling.getAsBoolean();
144    }
145
146    /** ******************* */
147    /** Roller Commands ** */
148    /** ******************* */
149    // until rollers are fixed
150    @Override
151    public AngularVelocity getRollerVelocity() {
152        return rollerMotorRight.getVelocity().getValue();
153    }
154
155    // until rollers are fixed
156    private boolean leftRollerStalling() {
157        return leftRollerStalling.get();
158    }
159
160    private boolean rightRollerStalling() {
161        return rightRollerStalling.get();
162    }
163
164    @Override
165    protected void stopMotors(IntakeMotorType motorType) {
166        switch (motorType) {
167            case PIVOT:
168                pivotMotor.stopMotor();
169                break;
170            case ROLLER:
171                // until rollers are fixed
172                rollerMotorLeft.stopMotor();
173                rollerMotorRight.stopMotor();
174                break;
175            case BOTH:
176                pivotMotor.stopMotor();
177                rollerMotorLeft.stopMotor();
178                rollerMotorRight.stopMotor();
179                break;
180        }
181        // re-add the follow control after stopMotor removes it
182        rollerMotorRight.setControl(followerController);
183    }
184
185    private ControlRequest getPivotControl(IntakeState currentState) {
186        boolean pivotAboveThreshold = isPivotAboveThreshold();
187        return switch (currentState) {
188            case INTAKE, OUTTAKE, DOWN -> pivotAboveThreshold
189                    ? pushdownController.withOutput(Settings.Intake.Pivot.PUSHDOWN_CURRENT.getAsDouble())
190                    : positionController.withPosition(currentState.getTargetAngle()).withSlot(0);
191            case HOMING_DOWN -> homingController;
192            case DIGEST -> positionController.withPosition(currentState.getTargetAngle()).withSlot(1);
193            default -> positionController.withPosition(currentState.getTargetAngle()).withSlot(0);
194        };
195    }
196
197    @Override
198    public void periodic() {
199        if (!EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE.get()) {
200            stopMotors(IntakeMotorType.BOTH);
201            return;
202        }
203        if (pivotVoltageOverride.isPresent()) {
204            pivotMotor.setVoltage(pivotVoltageOverride.get().in(Volts));
205            return;
206        }
207        // Input
208        final boolean pivotStalling = pivotStalling();
209        final IntakeState currentState = getState();
210        // State
211        if (currentState == IntakeState.HOMING_DOWN && (pivotStalling || limitSwitchHit())) {
212            seedPivotAngle(Settings.Intake.Pivot.DEPLOY_ANGLE);
213            setState(IntakeState.DOWN);
214        }
215        if ((currentState == IntakeState.DOWN) && (pivotStalling || limitSwitchHit())) {
216            seedPivotAngle(Settings.Intake.Pivot.DEPLOY_ANGLE);
217        }
218        // Output
219        final ControlRequest pivotControl = getPivotControl(currentState);
220        final DutyCycleOut rollerControl = rollerController.withOutput(currentState.getTargetDutyCycle());
221        // Apply
222        if (EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE_PIVOT.get()) {
223            pivotMotor.setControl(pivotControl);
224        } else {
225            stopMotors(IntakeMotorType.PIVOT);
226        }
227
228        if (EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE_ROLLERS.get()) {
229            rollerMotorLeft.setControl(rollerControl);
230        } else {
231            stopMotors(IntakeMotorType.ROLLER);
232        }
233        // Logging
234        this.pivotSignals.logAll();
235        // until rollers are fixed
236        this.rollerSignals.logAll();
237        DogLog.forceNt.log("Intake/Rollers/Stalling", leftRollerStalling() || rightRollerStalling());
238        DogLog.forceNt.log(
239                "Intake/Pivot/Pushing Down", pivotMotor.getAppliedControl() == pushdownController);
240        super.periodic();
241    }
242
243    @Override
244    public SysIdRoutine getIntakeSysIdRoutine() {
245        return SysId.getRoutine(
246                Settings.Intake.Pivot.RAMP_RATE,
247                Settings.Intake.Pivot.STEP_VOLTAGE,
248                "Intake",
249                this::setPivotVoltageOverride,
250                () -> pivotMotor.getPosition().getValue(),
251                () -> pivotMotor.getVelocity().getValue(),
252                () -> pivotMotor.getMotorVoltage().getValue(),
253                getInstance());
254    }
255}
